pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects 'Analyst Role: Agricultural Data Scientist'
setup_task.sh text indicates 'AgTech / Precision Agriculture' through 'Ag-Yield prediction' and 'AgTech' terminology
setup_task.sh REQUIRED DELIVERABLES text specifies exactly these three paths

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NCEP Reanalysis long-term monthly mean datasets for air temperature and precipitation, downloaded from noaa.gov. The target coordinates are 42°N and 266°E. The precipitation dataset (Gaussian T62 grid) has a longitude match near 266 (266.25) and latitude near 42 (42.856), with a peak precipitation in June (month index 5). The air temperature dataset (2.5° grid) has nearest coordinates at latitude 42.5 and longitudes 265.0 or 267.5, peaking in July (month index 6). The exact 266°E longitude match is absent in the raw air temperature grid, so checking for '266.' in exported CSV headers will fail for air temperature, highlighting a discrepancy between task requirements and dataset resolution.
